title: Secret Finds
description: A Datapack where you can find useful items all over the world!
body:
[![License: LICENSE-CC-BY-NC-4.0](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-CC%20BY--NC%204.0-blue)](https://github.com/MavLeague/secret_finds/blob/main/LICENSE-CC-BY-NC-4.0.md) # Secret Finds This datapack/ mod adds new unique items that can be found around the world. They're all compatible with single- and multiplayer and some even have unique multiplayer features!

## Items ### Item magnet This Item is self-explanatory. It can be used to pick up items in a 10-block radius.
Places of Discovery (Spoiler) Toolsmith's chests in Villages

### Dash Feather This Item is a must-have for travelers! When using this item, it gives you an insane Boost in the viewing direction. You also get no fall damage as long as the cooldown lasts.
Places of Discovery (Spoiler) End Cities

### Surface Leveler This fruit can help you when you're stuck in a mineshaft. When eaten, it teleports you back to the world surface.
Places of Discovery (Spoiler) Mineshafts

### Player Switch This item allows you to switch places with another Player in a 10-block radius. You can also give this item to an armor stand, and it will wait for somebody to switch once.
Places of Discovery (Spoiler) Jungle Temples

### Grid Placer When you put this item into your offhand, you're able to place 9 Blocks at once. (3x3)
Places of Discovery (Spoiler) Toolsmith's chests in Villages

# I'll add more items in the future, so stay tuned! If you wanna give **Feedback**, have **Feature requests** or if you've found some **Bugs**, don't bother but reach out to me [here!][Issue Tracker] [Issue Tracker]: https://github.com/MavLeague/secret_finds/issues
